verses.text: Josef' tapate beh Manasseh, Manasseh' tapa Makhir, Makhir' tapa Gilead, Gilead' tapa beh lutangte in hong naihin Moses leh Israel mite beh lutang ahi makaite' mai-ah thu gen uh a

“Israel mite tungah aisaanna tawh gamhluah dingin leitang piak ding Topa in ka topa tungah thu hong pia hi. Ka sanggampa uh Zelofehad' gamhluahte a tanute tungah piak dingin Topa in ka topa tungah thu hong pia hi

Ahih hangin Israel sungah minam dangte' tapate khat peuhpeuh tawh amaute kiteng leh ka pate uh' gamhluah panin amau-a' teng kilakhia-in a manawh minamte tungah tua gamh kipia beh ding hi. Tua ahih ciangin ko' ngahsa gamh a kikhenkhia ding ahi hi
Israel mite' Jubilee hong tun' ciangin amau-a'te pen a manawh minamte' tungah kipia beh ding hi. Ka pa uh namte' gamhluah panin amau-a' kikhenkhia ding hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Moses in Topa' genna tawh kizui-in Israel mite thu pia a, “Zelofehad minamte' genna man hi
Zelofehad' tanute tawh kisai-in Topa' thupiak hih bang ahi hi: ‘Amaute in hoih a sak pente uh tawh kiteng uh hen. Ahih hangin amau' behte bek ten'pih thei ding uh hi
Israel mite' gamhte minam khat pan namdang khatah paikhialo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mi khempeuh a minam gamhluah ciat uh tawh kip ding uh hi
Israel mi khempeuh in a pate uh' gamh a luah theihna dingun, Israel mite' sung panin minam khat peuhpeuhah gamh a nei tanu khempeuh pen a pate' nam sung khat peuhpeuh' zi hi ding hi
Tua ahih ciangin minam khat pan adangah gamh paikhialo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mite' sung panin minam khempeuh amau' gamh ciat tawh kip ding uh hi,’ ci hi,” ci-in a gen hi
Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin Zelofehad' tanute gamta uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Zelofehad' tanu Mahlah, Tirzah, Hoglah, Milkah, leh Noah-te, a pate uh' sanggamte' tapate tawh kiteng uh hi
Josef' ta Manasseh' tapate' innkuan sungah amaute in pasal nei uh a, a pate nam innkuan sungah amau' gamhluahte a kip hi
Hihte pen Jerikho nai Jordan kiang Moab zanglei-ah Israel mite tungah Moses tung tawnin Topa in a piak thupiaknate leh ngeina kipte ahi hi.
